title: 确认数量、颜色和规格
theme: 从 how many / what color / same as picture 开始
goals: 能礼貌询问客户需要的数量、颜色和规格
掌握 quantity / color / size / material / specification 的基础用法
客户信息不完整时，能用英文引导客户确认细节

review.title: Day 01 复习
items: 昨天练了 Please give me a moment to check. 和 I will update you today.
今天继续练确认信息，但重点从“我去查”转到“请客户确认细节”。
不要只问 how many，要把 quantity、color、size、material 说清楚。

preview.scenario: 客户问价格或想下单，但没有说清楚数量、颜色、尺寸和材料。
needToKnow: 报价前先确认 quantity，否则价格可能不准确。
颜色、尺寸、材料会影响价格和交期，不能默认客户知道。
客户说 same as picture 时，最好再次确认颜色、logo 和包装细节。

vocabulary.usage: 用于正式询问客户需要多少件。
vocabulary.example: Could you please confirm the quantity you need?

vocabulary.usage: 确认产品颜色或客户指定颜色。
询问客户需要的规格尺寸。
vocabulary.example: Could you please confirm the size?

vocabulary.usage: 确认产品使用什么材料。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the material before we quote.

vocabulary.usage: 比 size 更全面，包含尺寸、材料、颜色等。
vocabulary.example: Please send us the detailed specification.

vocabulary.usage: 说明颜色、材料或库存是否可做。
vocabulary.example: This color is available for the quantity you need.

vocabulary.usage: 确认客户是否需要样品或样品颜色。
vocabulary.example: Would you like to check a sample first?

vocabulary.usage: 泛指客户需要确认的信息。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the details so we can quote correctly.

sentences.label: 确认数量
sentences.natural: How many pieces do you need?
sentences.business: Could you please confirm the quantity you need?

sentences.label: 确认颜色
sentences.business: Could you please confirm the color you need for this order?

sentences.label: 确认尺寸
sentences.business: Could you please send us the size or detailed specification?

sentences.label: 确认材质
sentences.business: Please confirm the material before we check the price.

sentences.label: 信息不完整
sentences.natural: We need more details to quote.
sentences.business: To quote accurately, could you please confirm the quantity, color, size, and material?

chatAnalysis.problem: 太短，语气生硬，也没有说明是 pieces 还是 cartons。
chatAnalysis.better: How many pieces do you need?
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Could you please confirm the quantity you need for this order?
Could you please confirm the color you need for this order?

chatAnalysis.problem: 不够清楚，客户可能不知道你在确认颜色、logo 还是包装。
chatAnalysis.better: Do you need the same color as the picture?
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please confirm if you need the same color, logo position, and packaging as the picture.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：确认数量和颜色

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you quote this item?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Could you please confirm the quantity you need?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need 1,000 pieces.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Which color would you like?

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：确认规格后报价

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send me the best price.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. To quote accurately, could you please confirm the quantity, color, and size?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The quantity is 3,000 pieces, black color.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Got it. Could you also confirm the material you need?

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户想马上要价格

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why do you need so many details?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Because the price depends on the quantity, material, and specification.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I just need a rough price now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I can give you an estimated price first, and update the final price after you confirm the details.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：客户询价但信息不完整

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, can you quote this product?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Could you please confirm the quantity you need?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We may need around 2,000 pieces.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Is 2,000 pieces for the first order or for a sample order?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: It is for the first order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Got it. Which color would you like for this order?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Same as the picture.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please confirm if you need the same color and logo position as the picture.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, same color and same logo position.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Could you please confirm the size as well?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The size should be 20 centimeters.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. Do you need any special material or standard material?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Standard material is fine.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Okay. I will check the price based on 2,000 pieces, same color, same logo position, 20 centimeters, and standard material.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send the price today?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. Please give me a moment to check with our factory, and I will update you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do you have this color available?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Let me check the available color with our factory first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If the color is not available, what should we do?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If it is not available, I will suggest the closest available color for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, please also check the sample cost.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check the sample cost and the bulk order price together.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please make sure the quotation is accurate.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. I will confirm all details carefully before sending the quotation.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请确认你需要的数量。
exercises.answer: Please confirm the quantity you need.
acceptable: please confirm the quantity you need
could you please confirm the quantity you need

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：what color?
acceptable: could you please confirm the color you need
exercises.hint: which color 比 what color 更自然。

exercises.prompt: 填空：To quote accurately, please confirm the quantity, color, size, and ____.
客户只发图片让你报价，哪个回复更适合？
options: Could you please confirm the quantity, color, size, and material?
exercises.answer: Could you please confirm the quantity, color, size, and material?
acceptable: could you please confirm the quantity color size and material
exercises.hint: 要礼貌地引导客户补全信息。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：价格取决于数量和规格。
exercises.answer: The price depends on the quantity and specification.
acceptable: the price depends on the quantity and specification
the price depends on quantity and specification
the price depends on the quantity and specifications

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Please send me the best price. 但没有提供细节，你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Sure. To quote accurately, could you please confirm the quantity, color, size, and material?
acceptable: to quote accurately could you please confirm the quantity color size and material
could you please confirm the quantity color size and material
please confirm the quantity color size and material
exercises.hint: 先说明为了准确报价，然后确认关键细节。

homework: 把今天 5 个核心句子各读 5 遍。
用 quantity / color / size / material 各造 1 个客户确认句。
把三个短对话和长对话各听 2 遍，然后跟读 1 遍。
tomorrow: Day 3 会练客户问 MOQ、样品和交期时的回复。
